name: Kita Shinsuke
description:
pov farmer!kita x city girl

—in which your car breaks down by kita’s farm, and, like the gentleman he is, he doesn’t hesitate to help…only for him to realize that you were his old classmate in high school.

everybody say thank u loony for the fanart 😫

also don’t come for me, i know NOTHING abt farming, so if some terms are wrong or things don’t make sense that’s why, but i still had to write this lil fantasy out so eat my fat cock (im a female) 😚
creator: spriteshawty
